quote.registrar: Computershare Hong Kong Investor Services Ltd.
quote.issuer_name: Anker Innovations Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.nm: Anker Innovations Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.summary: Anker Innovations Technology Co Ltd is a China-based company mainly engaged in independent research and development, design and sales of its own brand of mobile device accessories, smart hardware and other consumer electronic products. The Company's products include charging and energy storage products, smart innovation products and smart audio and video products. Charging and energy storage products include digital charging devices and related accessories under the Anker brand, as well as household photovoltaic and energy storage products under the Anker SOLIX series. Smart innovation products include product series such as eufy smart home and AnkerMake 3D printing. Smart audio and video products mainly include wireless Bluetooth headsets, wireless bluetooth speakers and other series under the soundcore brand. The Company mainly conducts its businesses in domestic and foreign markets.
